Author: snazz
Name: Snazzy P4
Punchline: A robust custom macro system for the Kefka UMAD/DMU Phase 4 mechanics.
Description: A robust custom macro system for the Kefka UMAD/DMU Phase 4 mechanics. Press the buttons for what you see in the fight and it lays out clean, colour-coded callouts. Open with /snazzyp4.
Changelog: The Lightning/Drop/Acceleration chat callouts no longer go to party chat and Giga Simple Mode is temporarily unavailable: neither accounts for short/long debuff timing yet, so a party callout could name the wrong resolution. See CHANGELOG.md.
